en_title: Deltarune Chapter 5 Release Date Revealed as Toby Fox Offers Promising Update for the Future
cn_title: 《Deltarune》第5章6月24日发售，Toby Fox透露第6章进展
subtitle: 再见了，老朋友
opus_summary: 《Deltarune》第5章在任天堂直面会上公布，将于2026年6月24日登陆PC、Switch、Switch 2、PS4和PS5。Toby Fox透露第6章开发顺利，甚至有望年底前启动最终章第7章的制作。

paragraphs.en: Deltarune Chapter 5 finally has a release date, and Undertale mastermind Toby Fox has used the opportunity to give fans a progress update on Chapter 6.
paragraphs.cn: 《Deltarune》第5章终于有了发售日期，而《Undertale》的缔造者Toby Fox也借此机会向粉丝们透露了第6章的开发进展。

paragraphs.en: The yearlong wait for more from the lead developer's parallel story RPG finally came to an end when it showed up for today's June 2026 Nintendo Direct. The reveal came with a release date of June 24, 2026, promising to launch the fifth major update for PC, Nintendo Switch, Switch 2, PlayStation 4, and PlayStation 5 in just 15 days.
paragraphs.cn: 在今天的2026年6月任天堂直面会上，这款来自主创的平行故事RPG终于结束了长达一年的等待。公布信息显示，第5章将于2026年6月24日发售，仅15天后就将登陆PC、任天堂Switch、Switch 2、PS4和PS5。

paragraphs.en: It's been a little more than one year since Chapter 4 launched, so Fox made sure to make the wait worth it with a 46-second video that showed just enough while saving some of the best moments for full release. You can see the teaser footage in the Deltarune Chapter 5 trailer below.
paragraphs.cn: 距离第4章发售已过去一年多，Fox用一段46秒的视频让等待变得值得——视频恰到好处地展示了内容，同时将最精彩的时刻留到了正式版。你可以在下方的《Deltarune》第5章预告片中看到这段预告。

paragraphs.en: Immediately following Deltarune's Nintendo Direct cameo, Fox took to his to share a little bit more behind-the-scenes info. After a quick apology for the wait, he explained the trailer itself was made by artist Everdraed, with its music performed and arranged by Carlos "insaneintherain" Eiene. Animator, developer, and Undertale's Temmie, Temmie Chang, handled the lovely art featured at the end of the trailer.
paragraphs.cn: 在《Deltarune》亮相任天堂直面会后，Fox立即发文分享了一些幕后信息。在简短地为等待致歉后，他解释道，预告片本身由艺术家Everdraed制作，音乐由Carlos "insaneintherain" Eiene演奏和编排。动画师、开发者兼《Undertale》的Temmie——Temmie Chang——负责了预告片结尾的可爱美术。

paragraphs.en: "In Chapter 4, we saw dark clouds on the horizon… That’s why, let’s not look there for now," Fox said when describing Deltarune Chapter 5. "Let’s turn around and watch the sun, before it goes down completely. Let’s smile again. Let’s have one more fun adventure, okay?"
paragraphs.cn: 「在第4章中，我们看到了地平线上的乌云……所以，我们暂时先别看那里，」Fox在描述《Deltarune》第5章时说道，「让我们转过身，在太阳完全落下之前，好好看看它。让我们再次微笑。让我们再来一次有趣的冒险，好吗？」

paragraphs.en: "In my opinion, it fits well in the overall story of the game," he continued.
paragraphs.cn: 「在我看来，它很好地融入了游戏的整体故事，」他继续说道。

paragraphs.en: With the next chapter just weeks away, Fox is ready to offer a progress update on Chapter 6. He said it's "developing well," explaining there's been good progress on things like cutscenes and NPC interactions. Fox even went as far as to say that "this Chapter is easier to make than the others, so the development is going quite fast."
paragraphs.cn: 距离下一章仅剩几周，Fox准备透露第6章的开发进展。他表示第6章「开发顺利」，在过场动画和NPC互动等方面取得了良好进展。Fox甚至表示，「这一章比其他章节更容易制作，所以开发速度相当快。」

paragraphs.en: "This sounds crazy, but it’s not unrealistic that some staff members may start working on Chapter 7 before the end of the year," Fox added.
paragraphs.cn: 「这听起来很疯狂，但部分工作人员在年底前开始制作第7章并非不现实，」Fox补充道。

paragraphs.en: As Deltarune Chapter 5 prepares to launch and work on Chapter 6 progresses smoothly, the wait for the seventh and final chapter may not be quite as long as some believed. In the meantime, you can read IGN's 9/10 review of its first few chapters. You can also catch up on everything else announced at the June 2026 Nintendo Direct .
paragraphs.cn: 随着《Deltarune》第5章即将发售，第6章开发进展顺利，第七章也是最终章的等待时间可能不会像一些人想象的那么长。与此同时，你可以阅读IGN对前几章给出的9/10评测。你也可以回顾2026年6月任天堂直面会上公布的所有其他内容。
